mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_stock t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_stock WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_stock t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.location = #{location} ORDER BY t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_stock WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND location = #{location}

SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_stock t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND (t.item_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.location LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') ORDER BY t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_stock WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (item_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR location LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_stock t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.is_deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_stock t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.quantity < t.min_qty ORDER BY t.quantity ASC

SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_stock t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND t.expiry_date BETWEEN CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND DATEADD(DAY, #{days}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) ORDER BY t.expiry_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ppe_stock ( item_id, item_name, location, quantity, min_qty, opt_qty, expiry_date, note, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{location}, #{quantity}, #{minQty}, #{optQty}, #{expiryDate}, #{note}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_stock SET item_id = #{itemId}, item_name = #{itemName}, location = #{location}, quantity = #{quantity}, min_qty = #{minQty}, opt_qty = #{optQty}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate}, note = #{note}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_stock SET is_deleted = 1, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM tb_ppe_stock WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_stock WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND quantity < min_qty
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_stock WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND expiry_date BETWEEN CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND DATEADD(DAY, #{days}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
